summary: Free-space colors stay consistent across the menu bar and Disk Analysis, the startup splash shows dock-style scan progress again, and the dock icon only animates during real scans.
changed: Free-space colors — menu bar, Disk Analysis header badge, and Overview Free card share the same green/orange/red thresholds (25% and 10% free)
Startup splash — dock-style scanning animation with step-based progress badge replaces the static app icon during setup
Dock icon — scanning artwork appears only while a filesystem scan runs; normal icon on launch with sizing matched to other dock icons
Update button — toolbar control is icon-only (arrow.down.circle) with unchanged Check for Updates help tooltip
